domain_packs.name: AI Programming English
domain_packs.description: IDEs, AI coding assistants, agentic coding, Git, CLI, debugging, and technical documentation.

domain_packs.name: Web3 Developer English
domain_packs.description: Wallets, smart contracts, DeFi, RPC, block explorers, security, and on-chain development.

domain_packs.name: Programming Language & Runtime English
domain_packs.description: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Shell, YAML, frameworks, dependencies, runtime, and build tooling.

domain_packs.name: AI Platform & Model Tools English
domain_packs.description: Model platforms, APIs, tokens, context, billing, console settings, model docs, and account workflows.

domain_packs.name: Developer Cloud & Collaboration Tools English
domain_packs.description: GitHub, Google Cloud, Gmail, Google Drive, permissions, files, deployment environments, and collaboration workflows.

domain_packs.name: Product Design & Creative Tools English
domain_packs.description: Figma, Gamma, Lovart, prototyping, canvas, presentation, generation, and creative production tools.

cards.definition_zh: 扩展；安装到编辑器中、用于增加功能的插件式模块。
cards.definition_en: An add-on installed in an editor to extend its capabilities.

examples.example_en: Install the extension before you open the project workspace.
examples.example_zh: 打开项目工作区前，先安装这个扩展。

examples.example_en: Disable the extension if it slows down code completion.
examples.example_zh: 如果这个扩展拖慢代码补全，就把它禁用。

usage_tasks: 在「IDE界面」场景中识别 extension
把 extension 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ide_editor]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[integration]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ide_editor #F1

cards.definition_zh: 侧边栏；编辑器左侧或右侧用于显示文件、搜索、聊天等工具的区域。
cards.definition_en: A side panel in an editor that shows files, search, chat, or tool views.

examples.example_en: Open the sidebar to find the file tree.
examples.example_zh: 打开侧边栏，找到文件树。

examples.example_en: The AI chat panel is pinned in the right sidebar.
examples.example_zh: AI 聊天面板固定在右侧边栏。

usage_tasks: 在「IDE界面」场景中识别 sidebar
把 sidebar 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ide_editor]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[toolbar]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ide_editor #F1

cards.definition_zh: 工作区；编辑器当前打开的一组项目文件、设置和上下文。
cards.definition_en: The current project area opened in an editor, including files, settings, and context.

examples.example_en: Add the repository folder to the workspace.
examples.example_zh: 把仓库文件夹加入工作区。

examples.example_en: Cursor reads the workspace context before suggesting changes.
examples.example_zh: Cursor 会先读取工作区上下文，再给出修改建议。

usage_tasks: 在「IDE界面」场景中识别 workspace
把 workspace 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ide_editor]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[repository]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ide_editor #F2

cards.definition_zh: 命令面板；通过搜索快速执行编辑器命令的入口。
cards.definition_en: A searchable launcher for running editor commands quickly.

examples.example_en: Use the command palette to format the current file.
examples.example_zh: 用命令面板格式化当前文件。

examples.example_en: Search for the AI command in the command palette.
examples.example_zh: 在命令面板里搜索 AI 命令。

usage_tasks: 在「IDE界面」场景中识别 command palette
把 command palette 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ide_editor]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[terminal]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ide_editor #F3

cards.definition_zh: 设置；用于调整编辑器、扩展或项目行为的配置项。
cards.definition_en: Configuration options that control editor, extension, or project behavior.

examples.example_en: Change the editor settings before enabling auto-save.
examples.example_zh: 启用自动保存前，先修改编辑器设置。

examples.example_en: The model setting controls which AI model handles the request.
examples.example_zh: 模型设置控制由哪个 AI 模型处理请求。

usage_tasks: 在「IDE界面」场景中识别 settings
把 settings 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ide_editor]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[options]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ide_editor #F4

cards.definition_zh: 补全；AI 根据上下文生成的后续代码或文字。
cards.definition_en: Generated code or text that continues from the current context.

examples.example_en: Accept the completion only after reading the generated code.
examples.example_zh: 读完生成的代码后，再接受补全。

examples.example_en: The completion uses nearby files as context.
examples.example_zh: 这次补全使用了附近文件作为上下文。

usage_tasks: 在「AI代码助手」场景中识别 completion
把 completion 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ai_code_assistant]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[suggestion]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ai_code_assistant #F1

cards.definition_zh: 建议；AI 或工具提出的修改、解释或下一步操作。
cards.definition_en: A proposed change, explanation, or next action from an AI assistant or tool.

examples.example_en: Review the suggestion before applying it to the file.
examples.example_zh: 把建议应用到文件前，先检查它。

examples.example_en: The assistant gave a safer suggestion after reading the error message.
examples.example_zh: 助手读取错误信息后，给出了更安全的建议。

usage_tasks: 在「AI代码助手」场景中识别 suggestion
把 suggestion 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ai_code_assistant]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[completion]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ai_code_assistant #F1

cards.definition_zh: 行内聊天；在代码编辑区内直接向 AI 提问或要求修改的交互方式。
cards.definition_en: An in-editor chat interaction used to ask for explanations or code changes near the selected code.

examples.example_en: Use inline chat to explain the selected function.
examples.example_zh: 使用行内聊天解释选中的函数。

examples.example_en: Inline chat is faster than switching to a separate chat window.
examples.example_zh: 行内聊天比切换到单独聊天窗口更快。

usage_tasks: 在「AI代码助手」场景中识别 inline chat
把 inline chat 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
aliases: inline chat in AI代码助手
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ai_code_assistant]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[chat panel]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ai_code_assistant #F2

cards.definition_zh: 提示词；发送给 AI 的任务描述、约束和上下文说明。
cards.definition_en: An instruction or task description sent to an AI model, often with constraints and context.

examples.example_en: Write a precise prompt before asking the assistant to refactor code.
examples.example_zh: 让助手重构代码前，先写一个准确的提示词。

examples.example_en: A vague prompt may produce a risky patch.
examples.example_zh: 模糊的提示词可能生成有风险的补丁。

usage_tasks: 在「AI代码助手」场景中识别 prompt
把 prompt 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ai_code_assistant]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[context]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ai_code_assistant #F3

cards.definition_zh: 差异对比；显示文件修改前后变化的视图或结果。
cards.definition_en: A view or result showing the difference between two versions of a file.

examples.example_en: Check the diff before you accept the AI change.
examples.example_zh: 接受 AI 修改前，先检查差异对比。

examples.example_en: The diff shows that only one function was changed.
examples.example_zh: 差异对比显示只改了一个函数。

usage_tasks: 在「AI代码助手」场景中识别 diff
把 diff 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[ai_code_assistant]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[patch]] when memory feels unstable. #ai-programming-english #ai_code_assistant #F4

cards.definition_zh: 钱包；管理账户、密钥、签名和链上交易的软件或硬件工具。
cards.definition_en: A tool for managing accounts, keys, signatures, and blockchain transactions.

examples.example_en: Connect your wallet before signing the transaction.
examples.example_zh: 签署交易前，先连接钱包。

examples.example_en: The wallet shows the active network and account address.
examples.example_zh: 钱包会显示当前网络和账户地址。

usage_tasks: 在「钱包」场景中识别 wallet
把 wallet 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[wallet]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[account]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #wallet #F1

cards.definition_zh: 地址；代表链上账户或合约的公开标识。
cards.definition_en: A public identifier for a blockchain account or contract.

examples.example_en: Copy the address carefully before sending tokens.
examples.example_zh: 发送代币前，仔细复制地址。

examples.example_en: The block explorer shows transactions for this address.
examples.example_zh: 区块浏览器显示这个地址的交易。

usage_tasks: 在「钱包」场景中识别 address
把 address 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[wallet]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[private key]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #wallet #F1

cards.definition_zh: 助记词；用于恢复钱包的秘密词组，不能泄露。
cards.definition_en: A secret recovery phrase used to restore a wallet.

examples.example_en: Never paste your seed phrase into a website.
examples.example_zh: 不要把助记词粘贴到网站里。

examples.example_en: Store the seed phrase offline before using the wallet.
examples.example_zh: 使用钱包前，离线保存助记词。

usage_tasks: 在「钱包」场景中识别 seed phrase
把 seed phrase 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[wallet]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[private key]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #wallet #F2

cards.definition_zh: 签名；用私钥对消息或交易做出的加密确认。
cards.definition_en: A cryptographic approval made with a private key for a message or transaction.

examples.example_en: Read the message before approving the signature request.
examples.example_zh: 批准签名请求前，先阅读消息内容。

examples.example_en: A malicious signature can grant risky permissions.
examples.example_zh: 恶意签名可能授予有风险的权限。

usage_tasks: 在「钱包」场景中识别 signature
把 signature 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[wallet]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[approval]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #wallet #F3

cards.definition_zh: 网络；钱包当前连接的区块链环境，如主网或测试网。
cards.definition_en: The blockchain environment currently selected in a wallet, such as mainnet or testnet.

examples.example_en: Switch the network before opening the dApp.
examples.example_zh: 打开 dApp 前，先切换网络。

examples.example_en: The transaction failed because the wallet was on the wrong network.
examples.example_zh: 交易失败是因为钱包处在错误网络上。

usage_tasks: 在「钱包」场景中识别 network
把 network 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[wallet]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[node]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #wallet #F4

cards.definition_zh: 合约；部署到链上并按代码规则执行的程序。
cards.definition_en: A program deployed on-chain and executed according to its code.

examples.example_en: Deploy the contract to a testnet before using mainnet.
examples.example_zh: 上主网前，先把合约部署到测试网。

examples.example_en: The contract stores the user position on-chain.
examples.example_zh: 这个合约在链上存储用户仓位。

usage_tasks: 在「智能合约」场景中识别 contract
把 contract 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[smart_contract]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[agreement]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #smart_contract #F1

cards.definition_zh: 函数；合约中可以被调用的一段逻辑。
cards.definition_en: A callable unit of logic inside a smart contract.

examples.example_en: Call the function only after checking its parameters.
examples.example_zh: 检查参数后，再调用这个函数。

examples.example_en: A public function can be called from outside the contract.
examples.example_zh: 公开函数可以从合约外部调用。

usage_tasks: 在「智能合约」场景中识别 function
把 function 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[smart_contract]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[event]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #smart_contract #F1

cards.definition_zh: 事件；合约执行时写入日志、供前端或索引服务监听的记录。
cards.definition_en: A log emitted by a contract for frontends or indexers to listen to.

examples.example_en: Listen for the Transfer event after the transaction is mined.
examples.example_zh: 交易被打包后，监听 Transfer 事件。

examples.example_en: The event helps the frontend update the user interface.
examples.example_zh: 事件帮助前端更新用户界面。

usage_tasks: 在「智能合约」场景中识别 event
把 event 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[smart_contract]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[function]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #smart_contract #F2

cards.definition_zh: 应用二进制接口；描述合约函数、事件和参数编码方式的接口说明。
cards.definition_en: An interface description for encoding contract functions, events, and parameters.

examples.example_en: Load the ABI before calling the contract from JavaScript.
examples.example_zh: 从 JavaScript 调用合约前，先加载 ABI。

examples.example_en: The ABI tells the app how to encode function arguments.
examples.example_zh: ABI 告诉应用如何编码函数参数。

usage_tasks: 在「智能合约」场景中识别 ABI
把 ABI 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[smart_contract]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[bytecode]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #smart_contract #F3

cards.definition_zh: Gas；链上执行计算和存储操作所需支付的费用单位。
cards.definition_en: The fee unit used to pay for computation and storage on-chain.

examples.example_en: Estimate gas before sending the transaction.
examples.example_zh: 发送交易前，先估算 Gas。

examples.example_en: Complex contract calls usually require more gas.
examples.example_zh: 复杂的合约调用通常需要更多 Gas。

usage_tasks: 在「智能合约」场景中识别 gas
把 gas 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[smart_contract]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[ether]] when memory feels unstable. #web3-developer-english #smart_contract #F4

cards.definition_zh: 类型；描述值的形状、类别或可用操作的约束。
cards.definition_en: A description of a value category, shape, or allowed operations.

examples.example_en: Add a type annotation to make the function contract clear.
examples.example_zh: 添加类型标注，让函数约定更清楚。

examples.example_en: The error means the value has the wrong type.
examples.example_zh: 这个错误表示值的类型不对。

usage_tasks: 在「TS/JS」场景中识别 type
把 type 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[typescript_javascript]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[interface]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #typescript_javascript #F1

cards.definition_zh: 接口；描述对象结构、函数签名或模块边界的类型契约。
cards.definition_en: A type contract that describes object shape, function signatures, or module boundaries.

examples.example_en: Define an interface for the API response.
examples.example_zh: 为 API 响应定义一个接口。

examples.example_en: The component props should match this interface.
examples.example_zh: 组件属性应当匹配这个接口。

usage_tasks: 在「TS/JS」场景中识别 interface
把 interface 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[typescript_javascript]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[type alias]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #typescript_javascript #F1

cards.definition_zh: Promise；表示异步操作最终成功或失败结果的对象。
cards.definition_en: An object representing the eventual success or failure of an asynchronous operation.

examples.example_en: Return a promise from the fetch wrapper.
examples.example_zh: 从 fetch 封装函数返回一个 Promise。

examples.example_en: Handle the promise rejection before showing the result.
examples.example_zh: 显示结果前，先处理 Promise 拒绝。

usage_tasks: 在「TS/JS」场景中识别 promise
把 promise 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来

cards.definition_zh: 异步的；不会阻塞当前执行流程、可在稍后返回结果的。
cards.definition_en: Non-blocking and able to return a result later.

examples.example_en: Mark the function as async before using await.
examples.example_zh: 使用 await 前，先把函数标记为 async。

examples.example_en: The async request should show a loading state.
examples.example_zh: 异步请求应显示加载状态。

usage_tasks: 在「TS/JS」场景中识别 async
把 async 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[typescript_javascript]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[sync]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #typescript_javascript #F3

cards.definition_zh: 模块；封装并导出代码能力的文件或代码单元。
cards.definition_en: A file or code unit that encapsulates and exports functionality.

examples.example_en: Export the helper from a shared module.
examples.example_zh: 从共享模块导出这个辅助函数。

examples.example_en: The module import failed because the path was wrong.
examples.example_zh: 模块导入失败，因为路径不对。

usage_tasks: 在「TS/JS」场景中识别 module
把 module 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[typescript_javascript]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[package]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #typescript_javascript #F4

cards.definition_zh: 依赖；项目运行或构建时需要安装的外部包。
cards.definition_en: An external package required by a project to run or build.

examples.example_en: Install the dependency before running the build.
examples.example_zh: 运行构建前，先安装这个依赖。

examples.example_en: A vulnerable dependency can affect the whole project.
examples.example_zh: 有漏洞的依赖可能影响整个项目。

usage_tasks: 在「依赖管理」场景中识别 dependency
把 dependency 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[dependencies]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[dev dependency]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #dependencies #F1

cards.definition_zh: 版本；用于区分软件包发布状态和兼容范围的编号。
cards.definition_en: A number or label that identifies a package release and compatibility range.

examples.example_en: Pin the version if the new release breaks the build.
examples.example_zh: 如果新版本破坏构建，就固定版本。

examples.example_en: Check the version before updating the dependency.
examples.example_zh: 更新依赖前，先检查版本。

usage_tasks: 在「依赖管理」场景中识别 version
把 version 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[dependencies]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[tag]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #dependencies #F1

cards.definition_zh: 锁定文件；记录精确依赖版本，保证安装结果可复现的文件。
cards.definition_en: A file that records exact dependency versions to make installs reproducible.

examples.example_en: Commit the lockfile after changing dependencies.
examples.example_zh: 修改依赖后，提交锁定文件。

examples.example_en: The lockfile prevents different machines from installing different versions.
examples.example_zh: 锁定文件防止不同机器安装出不同版本。

usage_tasks: 在「依赖管理」场景中识别 lockfile
把 lockfile 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[dependencies]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[manifest]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #dependencies #F2

cards.definition_zh: 注册表；发布和下载软件包的在线仓库服务。
cards.definition_en: An online service where packages are published and downloaded.

examples.example_en: The package manager downloads packages from the registry.
examples.example_zh: 包管理器从注册表下载软件包。

examples.example_en: A private registry can host internal packages.
examples.example_zh: 私有注册表可以托管内部包。

usage_tasks: 在「依赖管理」场景中识别 registry
把 registry 与真实工具界面、文档或操作步骤连接起来
cards.notes: Personal acceptance card for [[dependencies]]. Focus: remember the word through scene, source, relation, and operational use. Compare with [[repository]] when memory feels unstable. #programming-language-runtime-english #dependencies #F3

cards.definition_zh: 对等依赖；要求宿主项目提供的兼容依赖版本。
cards.definition_en: A dependency version that the host project is expected to provide.

examples.example_en: Install the peer dependency to remove the warning.
examples.example_zh: 安装对等依赖以消除警告。

cards.definition_en: A specific API address or interface where a client sends requests.

examples.example_zh: 把请求发送到正确的端点。

cards.definition_en: A response mode where model output is returned incrementally as it is generated.

examples.example_zh: 把 API 密钥存放在环境变量里。

cards.definition_en: A key, token, or account detail used for authentication or access.

examples.example_en: Do not commit credentials to the repository.
examples.example_zh: 不要把凭证提交到代码仓库。

cards.definition_en: The boundary of resources and actions allowed for a key or token.

examples.example_en: Limit the scope of the key to the current project.
examples.example_zh: 把密钥权限范围限制在当前项目。

examples.example_en: A broad scope increases the impact of a leaked key.

cards.definition_zh: 轮换；停用旧密钥并启用新密钥，以降低泄露风险。
cards.definition_en: To replace an old secret with a new one to reduce security risk.

examples.example_en: Rotate the API key before sharing the project.
examples.example_zh: 分享项目前，先轮换 API 密钥。

examples.example_en: After rotation, update the deployment secret.
examples.example_zh: 轮换后，更新部署密钥。

cards.definition_zh: 撤销；让密钥、令牌或权限立即失效。
cards.definition_en: To invalidate a key, token, or permission immediately.

examples.example_en: Revoke the key if it appears in a public log.
examples.example_zh: 如果密钥出现在公开日志中，就撤销它。

examples.example_en: Revoked credentials can no longer call the API.
examples.example_zh: 被撤销的凭证无法再调用 API。
